overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a desert canyon environment with a small companion creature. The character walks and runs through rocky terrain, interacts with debris and collectible objects near crashed vehicles, and traverses a sci-fi desert landscape with warm orange-red rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert canyon with central rock spire

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desert canyon toward the tall central rock formation with a small companion creature following behind

notable_agents.action: small reptilian companion creature following closely behind the main character

entered.detail: tall jagged rock spire with layered orange-brown sedimentary textures dominating the center of the canyon
steep rocky cliff face with warm orange and red tones forming the left boundary of the canyon
rugged rock formation with layered strata forming the right boundary of the desert canyon
sandy trail with scattered small rocks and pebbles forming the path through the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide desert canyon under bright midday sun, approaching a prominent central rock spire. The environment features warm orange-red rock walls on both sides with sparse desert vegetation scattered across the sandy ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon debris field with wreckage

events.description: character transitions from walking to running pace
entering area with scattered debris and crashed vehicle wreckage

agents.ego_description: running through the canyon toward a debris field containing crashed vehicles and scattered containers

notable_agents.action: companion creature running to keep pace with the main character

entered.detail: wrecked sci-fi speeder vehicle partially buried in sand with dark metal hull
metal containers and wreckage pieces scattered across the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run while approaching a debris field containing crashed vehicle wreckage. The central rock formation shifts to the left as the camera advances, revealing scattered metal containers and desert wreckage in the sandy canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: wreckage field with collectible resource containers

events.description: character picks up red cylindrical fuel container from the ground
character picks up blue cylindrical fuel container near the wreckage

agents.ego_description: exploring the wreckage site and collecting cylindrical fuel containers, moving around the crashed vehicle hull

notable_agents.action: companion creature waiting nearby while character collects items

entered.detail: red cylindrical container with white stripes lying on the sand near wreckage
blue cylindrical container with glowing elements near the crashed speeder
large curved metal hull section of the crashed vehicle with exposed internal components

segments.scene_description: The character explores a concentrated wreckage area, picking up red and blue cylindrical fuel containers near a crashed speeder. The companion creature waits nearby as the character moves around the large metal hull debris, collecting resources in the sunlit desert canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with rocky walls

events.description: moving past the wreckage field into a narrower section of the canyon

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrower canyon passage leaving the wreckage behind, continuing the journey through rocky terrain

notable_agents.action: companion creature following closely as the path narrows

entered.detail: constricted canyon corridor with steep rock walls closing in on both sides
large scattered rocks and boulders lining the narrow canyon path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the wreckage field behind and enters a narrower section of the canyon where the rock walls close in. The path continues through rocky terrain with scattered boulders and sparse desert shrubs as the journey progresses deeper into the canyon system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert canyon that transitions from an open vista into a confined rocky corridor. It begins with the character walking under a bright midday sun toward a prominent central rock spire, flanked by warm orange-red walls and sparse vegetation. As the character breaks into a run, the spire shifts to the left to reveal a debris field of crashed vehicle wreckage and scattered metal containers. The scene then focuses on the character collecting red and blue fuel cylinders near a crashed speeder while a companion creature waits nearby amidst the sunlit hull debris. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the wreckage behind and enter a narrower section of the canyon where the rock walls close in around a path of boulders and desert shrubs.
